ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. Two pages. All fields clearly legible.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB' identified in invoice header as 'Nouryon Pulp and Performance Chemicals AB'
Consignee 'Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd' identified in invoice Bill To and Ship To fields
Order reference 5103496195 in certificate remarks matches invoice Our Order/Delivery No.
pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met: consignor name matches (with allowed abbreviation normalization), consignee matches exactly, and order reference matches. Valid document pair.

consignor.certificate_value: Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB, Gamlestadsvägen 18 B-C, BOX 47067, 40258, Göteborg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Nouryon Pulp and Performance Chemicals AB, BOX 47067, 402 58 Goteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor 'Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB' is a commercial abbreviation of 'Nouryon Pulp and Performance Chemicals AB' which appears in invoice header on all pages. 'Perf.' is a vedertagen abbreviation of 'Performance', 'Ch.' is a vedertagen abbreviation of 'Chemicals'. The core name 'Nouryon Pulp and ... AB' is identical. Proceeding to verify via 4.1.3.3.

comparison_steps.description: Verify if certificate name is a commercial abbreviation of invoice name
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB'. Invoice: 'Nouryon Pulp and Performance Chemicals AB'. The abbreviations 'Perf.' → 'Performance' and 'Ch.' → 'Chemicals' are vedertagna (well-established) abbreviations. All 5 conditions met: (1) abbreviated forms are clear and well-established, (2) full legal name appears explicitly in invoice, (3) no other party with similar name, (4) address and country match (BOX 47067, Göteborg/Goteborg, Sweden), (5) no contradicting information.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice header: Sweden. Additionally confirmed by VAT prefix SE in SE556022997201.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found in invoice header
Kommersiell förkortning - Perf. Ch. = Performance Chemicals

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB' at Gamlestadsvägen 18 B-C, BOX 47067, 40258, Göteborg, Sweden. Invoice issuer: 'Nouryon Pulp and Performance Chemicals AB' at BOX 47067, 402 58 Goteborg, Sweden. The certificate uses commercial abbreviations 'Perf.' for 'Performance' and 'Ch.' for 'Chemicals'. These are standard, well-established abbreviations. Rule 4.1.3.3 applies: all conditions satisfied. Country: Sweden in both. VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden. MATCH.
consignor.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB' identifieras i fakturan som 'Nouryon Pulp and Performance Chemicals AB'. Skillnaden utgörs av vedertagna kommersiella förkortningar (Perf. = Performance, Ch. = Chemicals) enligt regel 4.1.3.3. BOX-adress och land (Sweden) överensstämmer. VAT-prefix SE bekräftar land.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Different legal entity due to abbreviated name
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.1.3.3 explicitly allows commercial abbreviations when the full legal name appears in the invoice. 'Perf.' and 'Ch.' are standard abbreviations of 'Performance' and 'Chemicals'. Same BOX number (47067), same city, same country.

consignee.certificate_value: Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd, Long Binh Ward, Lot 107, Amata Industrial Zone, 76000 BIEN HOA, VIETNAM
consignee.invoice_value: Bill To: Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd, Lot E-1-CN, My Phuoc 2 Industrial Park, Ben Cat ward, 75000 HO CHI MINH CITY, VIETNAM | Ship To: Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd, Long Binh Ward, Lot 107, Amata Industrial Zone, 76000 BIEN HOA, VIETNAM

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Bill To field identified: Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has explicit 'Bill To' field with 'Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd'. This is the primary factureringsfält per priority rule 4.2.0.2.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name against invoice Bill To
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignee: 'Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd'. Invoice Bill To: 'Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate: VIETNAM. Invoice Bill To: VIETNAM. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Address differs between certificate and Bill To but same company and country
comparison_steps.result: Not relevant for MATCH/MISMATCH per rule 4.2.4
comparison_steps.details: Certificate address: Long Binh Ward, Lot 107, Amata Industrial Zone, 76000 BIEN HOA. Invoice Bill To address: Lot E-1-CN, My Phuoc 2 Industrial Park, Ben Cat ward, 75000 HO CHI MINH CITY. Per rule 4.2.4, differences in street address do not affect the result when company name and country match. The certificate address matches the Ship To address exactly.

rules_applied.description: Prioritetsordning - Bill To field used as primary
rules_applied.outcome: Bill To identified as primary factureringsfält
MATCH - exact match: Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd

rules_applied.description: Address difference does not cause MISMATCH when name and country match

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd' in VIETNAM. Invoice Bill To: 'Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd' in VIETNAM. Company name is an exact match. Country is an exact match. The street address differs (certificate shows Long Binh Ward/Amata Industrial Zone/BIEN HOA, invoice Bill To shows My Phuoc 2 Industrial Park/HO CHI MINH CITY), but per rule 4.2.4 this does not cause MISMATCH. Additionally, the Ship To address in the invoice matches the certificate address exactly. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd' återfinns exakt i fakturans Bill To-fält. Land (Vietnam) överensstämmer. Adressskillnaden (Long Binh Ward vs My Phuoc 2 Industrial Park) påverkar inte bedömningen enligt regel 4.2.4 då företagsnamn och land matchar.

rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.2.4 explicitly states that differences in street address, office address or postal code shall NOT cause MISMATCH when company name and country match. The company Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd has multiple locations in Vietnam. The Ship To address in the invoice matches the certificate address exactly.

goods_description.certificate_value: Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS Bags 4X3 KG
goods_description.invoice_value: Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS Bags 4X3 KG

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in certificate
comparison_steps.result: No explicit article number in certificate
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not contain a separate article/material number field. The material number 8023474 appears only in the invoice. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify and compare the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS Bags 4X3 KG'. Invoice Material Description: 'Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS Bags 4X3 KG'. Exact match of the complete product description after normalization of case. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning is 'Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS' and it matches exactly.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 - No article number in certificate, skip to Priority 2
Priority 2 - Kontrollerad textmatchning with identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description contains 'Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS Bags 4X3 KG'. Invoice item 10 material description: 'Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS Bags 4X3 KG'. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS' is identical in both documents. The packaging specification 'Bags 4X3 KG' also matches exactly. No article number was present in the certificate so Priority 2 (text matching) was used. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS Bags 4X3 KG' återfinns exakt i fakturans materialbeskrivning. Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen matchar fullständigt.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the quantity in box 7 as the verification basis
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 (Quantity/Mängd) contains 'G/W 726,00 KG'. This is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet per rule 4.4.2.1. G/W = Gross Weight. Numeric value: 726.00. Unit: KG. Weight category: GW.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 726.00 in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice item 10 states 'Gross Weight 726,000 KG'. The numeric value 726,000 KG (with comma as tusentalsavskiljare in the European notation used, or 726.000 in the invoice's decimal notation — this is 726 KG with three decimal zeros). Certificate value is 726,00 KG. After normalization: certificate 726.00 KG GW, invoice 726.000 KG GW. Applying allowed truncation: 726.000 truncated to 2 decimals = 726.00. MATCH.
Certificate: G/W (Gross Weight). Invoice: Gross Weight. Same category.

rules_applied.outcome: G/W 726,00 KG identified as verification basis
MATCH - 726.00 KG GW found in invoice as 726,000 KG Gross Weight

rules_applied.description: Viktkategori verification - GW matches Gross Weight

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'G/W 726,00 KG'. Invoice: 'Gross Weight 726,000 KG'. The certificate uses European decimal notation with comma (726,00 = 726.00). The invoice uses notation '726,000' which in the context of this document (using comma as thousands separator for amounts like '12.474,00' and '14.520,00') means 726.000 KG = 726 KG exactly. After normalization both values represent 726 KG gross weight. Truncation of invoice's third decimal (726.000 → 726.00) is allowed per 4.4.3. Weight category GW matches Gross Weight. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 'G/W 726,00 KG' (bruttovikt 726 kg) överensstämmer med fakturans 'Gross Weight 726,000 KG'. Numeriskt värde och viktkategori matchar efter tillåten decimaltrunkering.

rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The invoice uses European number formatting where comma is thousands separator for monetary amounts (e.g., '12.474,00') and period for thousands in amounts. For weights, '726,000 KG' uses comma as thousands separator, meaning 726.000 KG (726 KG). This is confirmed by the Net Weight being '264,000 KG' which would be implausible as 264000 KG for 22 boxes. Additionally, the invoice's quantity column shows '264,000 KG' for the same item, consistent with 264 KG product per the context.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice item 10 contains explicit field 'Country of Origin Sweden'. This is an explicit origin designation.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Sweden'. Exact match, no normalization needed.

rules_applied.description: Explicit origin field identified in invoice
Positive verification - Sweden explicitly identified in invoice origin field

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice item 10: 'Country of Origin Sweden'. Exact match. No normalization required. Single origin country, single item in invoice. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' (ruta 3) återfinns exakt i fakturans fält 'Country of Origin Sweden'. Fullständig och entydig matchning.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Not applicable - no LC reference found in certificate
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate number SEG-25D-421376 is a certificate reference, not an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar found.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Valid pair identified - Document A is certificate, Document B is invoice
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate file contains one ORIGINAL certificate. Invoice file contains a 2-page invoice. Single pair, no ambiguity.
Consignor identifiable in invoice (via commercial abbreviation), consignee matches exactly, order reference 5103496195 matches.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Applicable - 'Nouryon' core name found in invoice header, VAT block, and multiple locations
rule_evaluation_log.details: Full name 'Nouryon Pulp and Performance Chemicals AB' found in invoice header on all pages. Certificate abbreviation 'Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB' is identifiable via commercial abbreviation rule.
'Perf.' = 'Performance', 'Ch.' = 'Chemicals' are vedertagna abbreviations. All 5 conditions met.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice header: Sweden. VAT prefix SE confirms.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Bill To used as primary field
rule_evaluation_log.details: Invoice has explicit Bill To field with Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd.
Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd = Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Address difference noted but not relevant for MATCH/MISMATCH
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate: Long Binh Ward, Bien Hoa. Invoice Bill To: My Phuoc 2 Industrial Park, Ho Chi Minh City. Different addresses for same company. Rule 4.2.4 states address differences shall not cause MISMATCH when name and country match. Ship To address matches certificate exactly.
Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS Bags 4X3 KG' identical in both documents.
Invoice Gross Weight 726,000 KG matches certificate G/W 726,00 KG after normalization.
Allowed truncation from 3 decimals to 2 decimals. Values identical.
Explicit origin field in invoice item 10.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland matchar. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: Certificate of Origin SEG-25D-421376 issued 2025-12-17 for Nouryon Pulp and Perf. Ch. AB (Sweden) shipping Expancel 920 DE 40 d30 AS to Akzo Nobel Vietnam Ltd (Vietnam). All five checkpoints verified as MATCH against invoice 1589146263. Consignor matched via commercial abbreviation rule (Perf. Ch. = Performance Chemicals). Consignee matched exactly. Goods description matched exactly. Gross weight 726 KG matched. Origin Sweden matched.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

Adressskillnaden (Bien Hoa vs Ho Chi Minh City) påverkar inte bedömningen då namn och land matchar. Fakturans Ship To-adress överensstämmer dessutom exakt med certifikatets adress.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent. All confidence values ≥ 0.85. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is appropriate.
